How It Works

A Simple Process. Serious Results.

From your first call to your final dispute round, you always know exactly where your file stands.

01

Kickoff Call

We review your credit file together, set clear expectations, map out your goals, and answer every question before anything gets started.

02

Dispute Rounds

We send targeted disputes every 35–40 days to keep continuous pressure on inaccurate items across Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion.

03

Updates & Results

You get notified every time disputes go out, plus regular check-in calls — so you're never left wondering about your progress.

After Completion

We Remove.
You Improve.
Your Future Transforms.

New credit cards & loansQualify for better limits and lower rates
A new carDrive off the lot with financing that works for you
A new home or apartmentPass rental screenings and mortgage pre-approvals
& much moreBusiness funding, travel rewards, financial freedom
What We Do

Two Services. One Mission.

We fix the file, then we get you funded. That's it — and we do both at the highest level.

Credit Repair Done For You

Full-service dispute management across Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion — collections, charge-offs, late payments, inquiries, repos, and more. Dispute rounds every 35–40 days, with progress reports so you see every deletion.

Personal & Business Funding Access Capital

Once your file is clean and positioned correctly, we help you go get the money — high-limit personal cards, business credit, and the funding to launch or scale what you're building.

Ready to open the vault?

(470) 726-6168 decreety45@gmail.com @milpasmogul Atlanta, GA — Serving Nationwide
Meet the Founder

Integrity. Education. Results.

Tyree Decree founded GoVault Funding on a simple belief: your past shouldn't lock you out of your future. Too many people are held back by credit reports full of inaccurate, outdated, and unverifiable items they never knew they could challenge.

Based in Atlanta and serving clients nationwide, Tyree personally leads every client's credit strategy — combining aggressive, law-backed dispute tactics with real education, so you don't just fix your credit. You learn how to keep it strong for life.

TrustGrowthSecuritySuccess

GoVault Funding is a credit services organization. Results vary by individual credit file and are not guaranteed. We do not remove accurate and verifiable information from credit reports. Consumers have the right to dispute inaccurate information directly with the credit bureaus at no cost. Services are provided in accordance with the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) and the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA). Nothing on this site constitutes legal or financial advice.
